title: EAFIX SSOT Registry Delivery Verification Evidence Manifest
purpose: Run-specific, hash-addressed inventory of every evidence object used to support verification check and plan-obligation verdicts.
authority_notice: This artifact is not evidence by itself. It becomes an evidence manifest only after a verifier freezes the run context, collects immutable evidence, validates all records, and seals the manifest.
specification_alignment_note: The canonical verification specification requires an evidence manifest in its evidence and completion contracts even though the manifest is not listed as a separate required_package_artifact entry. This file operationalizes that required contract without changing the specification.

run_root_contract.path_rule: Use repository-relative POSIX paths inside the evidence bundle. External URIs require immutable commit, run, or artifact identifiers.

requirement_ids: one or more evidence requirement IDs
record_shape.title: concise evidence title
record_shape.description: what was observed and why it is relevant

producer.identity: agent, person, tool, or CI system

evidence_record_contract.hash_rule: Every file or payload evidence object must have SHA-256. External URIs also record immutable commit/run identifiers when available.
evidence_record_contract.command_rule: Command evidence records exact command, working directory, environment summary, start/end time, exit code, stdout path, and stderr path.
evidence_record_contract.manual_rule: Manual evidence records reviewer identity, reviewed artifacts/hashes, rationale, and explicit conclusion.
evidence_record_contract.reference_rule: Verification results refer to evidence_id values; unsupported prose is not evidence.

stale_triggers: A relevant authority or schema changes.
A relevant CI workflow changes after execution.
A validated input or generated artifact changes.
Evidence cannot be tied to an immutable commit, run, or hash.
freshness_contract.rule: Stale or unverifiable evidence cannot support pass.

Publish an honest final status

seal_rules: Freeze run context before collecting evidence.
Validate every evidence record and reference.
Reject stale, unverifiable, missing, or hash-invalid pass evidence.
Compute the evidence-root hash from stable sorted evidence record hashes.
Record this file's SHA-256 externally after final serialization; do not self-hash.
Do not add, remove, or modify evidence records after sealing.

template_completion_instructions: Populate and freeze run_context before executing Gate 00.
Collect evidence records; never overwrite an existing evidence ID.
Update evidence requirement, check, and obligation indexes deterministically.
Seal only after all report evidence references resolve.
Record the sealed manifest SHA-256 in the final verification report.

integrity.serialization: UTF-8, LF newlines, 2-space indentation, trailing newline.
integrity.self_hash_policy: Do not embed this file's SHA-256 after mutation. Store it in the final verification report and immutable run metadata.
